LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 15, 2014, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY DEFENDANT LUCAS, THOMAS A. AS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE ESTATE OF STANFORD A. THOMSON AKA STANDFORD A. THOMSON

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION ARE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF APPARENTLY RELIES ON PROBATE CODE SEC. 6451(A) TO SUPPORT HIS ASSERTION THAT THE ADOPTION SEVERED THE PARENT/CHILD RELATIONSHIP. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT, HOWEVER, ONLY REFERS TO PROBATE CODE SEC. 6451(B). PLAINTIFF SHOULD PLEAD THE CORRECT CODE PROVISION. THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION HAVE SUFFICIENT FACTS AND PLAINTIFF ADEQUATELY ALLEGES A DUTY TO DISCLOSE. THE DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE A RECOGNIZED CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2014 Continued To Aug-06-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT as to the first and second causes of action are sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff apparently relies on Probate Code sec. 6451(a) to support his assertion that the adoption severed the parent/child relationship. The amended complaint, however, only refers to Probate Code sec. 6451(b). Plaintiff should plead the correct code provision. The first and second causes of action have sufficient facts and plaintiff adequately alleges a duty to disclose. The demurrer to the third cause of action is sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege a recognized cause of action. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Continued To May-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to May 15, 2014, to give the opposing party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
